title: TicketDigest
description: A compact, normalized per-ticket representation extracted once by the `rebar.llm.enrich` op (the Cupid pattern, arXiv:2308.10022). Feeds store-wide overlap detection (BM25F retrieval + pairwise judge) WITHOUT embeddings. Deterministic payload (no timestamps/uuids) so a stored digest record is stable modulo LLM wording. `propositions` are 2-6 atomic problem/repro statements; logs/stack-traces/code are discarded by the prompt.

problem_keywords.description: Salient problem/domain keywords (deduped, lowercased where natural).

component_or_area.description: The component / subsystem / area this ticket concerns (a short phrase).

key_entities.description: Named, specific entities: config keys, schema/table names, file regions, functions, event types.

propositions.description: 2-6 atomic problem/repro statements capturing what the ticket is fundamentally about.
